records.ety: [OE. banere, OF. baniere, F. bannire, bandire, fr. LL. baneria, banderia, fr. bandum banner, fr. OHG. bant band, strip of cloth; cf. bindan to bind, Goth. bandwa, bandwo, a sign. See Band, n.]

defs: A kind of flag attached to a spear or pike by a crosspiece, and used by a chief as his standard in battle.
quotes: Hang out our banners on the outward walls.

defs: A large piece of silk or other cloth, with a device or motto, extended on a crosspiece, and borne in a procession, or suspended in some conspicuous place.
Any flag or standard; as, the star-spangled banner.
